description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, flat surface and four straight legs, designed in a minimalist style. The table features a single pull-out drawer on one side, equipped with a small round knob for easy access. The wood grain is visible across the tabletop and legs, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The drawer is integrated seamlessly into the design, with no additional decorative elements or embellishments. The table's proportions suggest it is suitable for writing, dining, or general utility in urban environments such as offices, parks, or public spaces. Its sturdy construction and functional drawer make it practical for both work and casual use.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden table with four legs and a single pull-out drawer, featuring a smooth wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tabletop and the drawer's position on the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open drawer and the table's four-leg support structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the drawer closed and the tabletop's clean edge visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back of the table and all four legs.
